title: FeeApplicationFrequencyValues
description: How frequently the fee/charge is applied. (Open Banking)

x-enumeration-literals.name: OnClosing
x-enumeration-literals.description: This fee is triggered on closing of a product

x-enumeration-literals.name: OnOpening
x-enumeration-literals.description: This fee is triggered on opening of a product

x-enumeration-literals.name: ChargingPeriod
x-enumeration-literals.description: This fee is triggered at the end of each charging period

x-enumeration-literals.name: Daily
x-enumeration-literals.description: This fee is triggered every day

x-enumeration-literals.name: PerItem
x-enumeration-literals.description: This fee is triggered by the processing of an item on the product

x-enumeration-literals.name: Monthly
x-enumeration-literals.description: This fee is triggered monthly

x-enumeration-literals.name: OnAnniversary
x-enumeration-literals.description: This fee is triggered on the anniversary of opening the product

x-enumeration-literals.name: Other
x-enumeration-literals.description: Other Fee Frequency

x-enumeration-literals.name: PerHundredPounds
x-enumeration-literals.description: This fee is triggered for every hundred pounds withdrawn

x-enumeration-literals.name: PerHour
x-enumeration-literals.description: This fee is triggered every hour

x-enumeration-literals.name: PerOccurrence
x-enumeration-literals.description: This fee is triggered per occurrence of the transaction or service. This differs from PerItem, in that if a batch of items is processed at the same time, a PerOccurrence fee would incur a single charge, whereas a PerItem fee would be charged for each item within the batch.

x-enumeration-literals.name: PerSheet
x-enumeration-literals.description: This fee is levied on every statement sheet

x-enumeration-literals.name: PerTransaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: The fee is charged for each transaction

x-enumeration-literals.name: PerTransactionAmount
x-enumeration-literals.description: The amount stated is levied for each transaction processed

x-enumeration-literals.name: PerTransactionPercentage
x-enumeration-literals.description: The fee amount is the given percentage of the transaction processed and is levied for each transaction

x-enumeration-literals.name: Quarterly
x-enumeration-literals.description: This fee is triggered at the end of every quarter

x-enumeration-literals.name: SixMonthly
x-enumeration-literals.description: This fee is triggered at the end of every 6 month period

x-enumeration-literals.name: StatementMonthly
x-enumeration-literals.description: This fee is triggered based on a monthly statement period

x-enumeration-literals.name: Weekly
x-enumeration-literals.description: The fee is triggered weekly

x-enumeration-literals.name: Yearly
x-enumeration-literals.description: This fee is triggered yearly
